summary: PR #75363 is the canonical adopted automerge candidate. It is open, non-security, and same-repo branch writable, but not merge-ready because the hydrated ClawSweeper review still reports an actionable Discord REST stale-dropping blocker. Merge and close are blocked by job frontmatter, so the safe path is a bounded repair on the contributor branch.

actions.reason: Adopted automerge PR needs branch repair before another ClawSweeper review; merge and close are blocked for this worker.
A cluster-scoped fix artifact is needed so the executor can repair the contributor branch and re-run review gates.
